response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent hands-on involvement with AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks, which is directionally relevant. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a Director-level IC position requiring recognized AI thought leadership, demonstrated large-scale cloud or AI platform development, and strategic customer advisory capability. His AI exposure is recent and tactical — tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure — rather than foundational platform architecture or industry-recognized innovation. There is no evidence of published research, keynote-level influence, strategic enterprise advisory work, or the deep cloud specialization this role demands, and he lacks the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field.
strengths: 20+ years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq includes direct AI-agent infrastructure work and MCP (Model Context Protocol) framework development, showing early alignment with the AI focus
Founder of GISCollective and prior staff/senior IC roles across multiple companies demonstrate entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related field — a preferred qualification that typically signals the research depth expected at Director-level AI strategy
AI involvement is recent (April 2025) and implementation-level; no demonstrated large-scale AI platform, recognized publications, or external thought leadership in AI or cloud
No evidence of strategic customer or partner advisory experience, cloud platform architecture at scale, or the influence and inspiration mandate central to this role's key responsibilities
